projectDescription: A multi-tenant SaaS platform for freight forwarders and logistics companies to manage warehouse operations, package tracking, courier partnerships, and automated billing.
keyFeatures: Package intake, inline editing, and dual-weight (LBS/KG) tracking
Public customer-facing tracking portal with timeline milestones
Courier partner ecosystem with custom branding, AWB sequence generation, and API key management
AES-256 encrypted inbound/outbound webhooks for real-time package and status sync
Flight manifest creation with airline auto-detection via AWB prefix
Tiered billing and rate engine with draft/published/paid invoice lifecycle
Invoice Ninja deep integration for external accounting synchronization
Role-based access control for Admins, Managers, and Courier partners
Executive dashboard with real-time KPIs, 14-day intake trends, and courier distribution charts
Export capabilities to CSV, XLSX, and JSON
Background worker supervisor for dispatch daemon management
Drag-and-drop webhook payload designer with template variables
publicApiSurface: POST /api/packages — create a new package intake record
PUT /api/packages/{id} — update package details (weight, tracking, description)
GET /api/track/{tracking_number} — public tracking endpoint returning timeline milestones
POST /api/couriers/{id}/webhooks — register inbound webhook for a courier
X-API-KEY bearer token authentication for all API endpoints
